releaseNotesMarkdown:
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

_Internal-only changes — 1 commit(s) hidden._

### Forge Tools improvements

- Peer(trickster): correct _reduceMotion guard order in AnnounceIntensityTierTransition and AnnounceIntensityTierCooldown
- Forge(torchbearer): add OnClosing() to SpatialForgeGuideOverlay for DropShadowEffect cleanup
- Forge(wayfinder): idle tips show once per session, not per cycle
- Peer(cartomancer): fix session-shown idle tip fallback to restart from tip 0 instead of using stale index
- Patrol(glimmerscale): enhance Pong with power-up drops, dynamic AI, and score-based popup colors
- Peer(anvilwyrm): reset _nextPowerUpScore on game-over restart so power-ups fire correctly across sessions
- Patrol(pillwright): Created Session Record Pulse — NEW RECORD! celebration when session best is broken
- Patrol(revelwright): add session multi-tool milestone ceremony with 3/5/10/15/20 thresholds
- Peer(chaosmaw): add ReduceMotion guard to OnSessionToolMilestone
- Elder(cruciwyrm): unsubscribe OnSessionToolMilestone in OnClosed to prevent zombie listener
- Patrol(loretome): add 1.0.34 changelog block for Toast progress bar, keyboard shortcuts, confetti, overlay crash fix
- Patrol(treasureveil): scale achievement reveal duration and drama by rarity
- Patrol(lorespell): correct modifier count 75→76 in RTMTools.Core/README.md
- Patrol(runeweave): rename ResolveAndInject to ResolveBatch in ScheduleForge
- Forge(oraclevein): add patrol_history to health_report timestamp map
- Patrol(hearthwind): Add first-run hint to FittingForgeWindow
- Patrol(exportguard): no export reliability issues found — batch export system already hardened
- Patrol(clockwright): add clean script to forge-mcp package.json
- Patrol(foundry): removed broken VerifyOutputAssets target from CheckBuildAssets.targets
- Patrol(switchyard): add IsLinked guard to ToggleHighlightCollisionsCommand
- Patrol(ironvow): hardened KeynoteModels JSON deserialization with ReferenceLoopHandling and ContractResolver
- Peer(hearthstone): remove duplicate using Newtonsoft.Json directive
- Forge(forgewyrm-creator): add CommandAspirationState persistence to ArcadeManager
- Peer(trickster): fix Save() wrapper Version from 10 to 12
- Patrol(steelward): handle AggregateException in ForgeResults.Unwrap; use root ex for StackTrace in CadForge and ListPanelSchedules
- Elder(ironwyrm): extend root-exception fix to PlotForge ShowCriticalErrorDialog
- Forge(plumbersmith-creator): fix ForgeCelebrationEngine Fire() race with anchored celebrations
- Patrol(preflightguard): add TryPreflight to BarForgeCommand.Run() static entry
- Patrol(aegis): guard division-by-zero in ListSheetsWithRevisionsWindow progress display (total=0 produces NaN%)
- Patrol(custodian): fix lambda event leak in ExportForgeViewModel — track and unsubscribe PropertyChanged lambdas on Dispose()
- Patrol(swiftblade): add WhereElementIsNotElementType before OfClass in CopyImportVisibilityHalftoneCommand FEC chain
- Forge(arcadesmith-creator): add HandleInput + OnInput to ArcadeGameBase for declarative input routing
- Patrol(cinderbloom): stop and null _bannerDismissTimer in OnWindowClosed, unsubscribe self-Closed event to prevent reference leak
- Patrol(embersong): swap OfClass/WhereElementIsNotElementType order in SortForge schedule collector
- Forge(luxesmith-creator): add LuxeBreadcrumb navigation component to Luxe design system
- Patrol(emberveil): Upgrade AboutWindow AchievementProgress to LuxeMiniProgressBarStyle
- Patrol(flameveil): added AutomationProperties to 10 interactive elements in PatchNotesWindow for WCAG 2.1 AA screen reader compliance
- Keyforge: surface reload-skip reason to user + clarify RDKM context
- Keyforge: fix race in stale-RDKM log dedup (HashSet -> ConcurrentDictionary)
- Patrol(compassforge): IdeaSmith - restore last-selected tool and category
- Forge(pixelwright): Added Stats Match mini-game to ArcadeProfileWindow
- Patrol(anvil): flatten AssignSortValuesFromPosition 4-level nesting into guard clauses + ResolveDisciplineMajor helper
- Peer(trickster): null DropShadowEffect on StatMatch cards in StopStatMatch cleanup
- Forge(juicesmith): gate exhaust particles on ReduceMotion in Void Drifter
- Forge(torchbearer): add SheetForgeGuideOverlay interactive walkthrough
- Forge(oraclevein): replace broken CLI-based forge-memory calls with correct MCP tool guidance
- Forge(routesmith): add query_agent_status MCP tool and fix coord skill
- Patrol(exportguard): wire IForgeStatusProviderEx.CanCancel and RequestCancel for ExportForge
- Peer(runesmith): wire cancellation token through ExportOptions to batch loop
- Elder(lorewyrm): wire CancellationToken from ViewModel through to ExportItems batch loop
- Patrol(switchyard): fix AvailabilityContext and context guard for viewport/halftone commands
- Patrol(steelhammer): wrap sheet number/name Set() calls in DuplicateForgeWindow.DuplicateSheet in explicit Transaction
- Patrol(slagbeard-creator): register LOREMASTER achievement so toast action button unlocks work
- Patrol(steelward): log CreateExternalCommandDataShim outer catch with Diagnostics.Log
- Patrol(ironhelm): wrap SeedDefaults in try-catch so all 6 built-in commands attempt registration even if one throws
- Forge(plumbersmith-creator): add LevelUpFanfareEngine — contextual milestone celebrations (Bronze→Mythic tiers)
- Patrol(aegis): replace .First() with direct index access in SortForge and SheetIndexSorter nudge buttons
- Patrol(custodian): add Dispose() to WayfinderTipEngine and wire into RTMRunHelper.Dispose()
- Patrol(swiftblade): add WhereElementIsNotElementType to ChangeSystemTypeCommand FEC chain
- Forge(arcadesmith-creator): harden arcade game infrastructure - ArcadeGameBase OnClosing cleanup, long-safe score persist, complete input reset
- Patrol(cinderbloom): add OnClosed event unsubscription for IsVisibleChanged and Loaded in CheckListWindow
- Patrol(embersong): add WhereElementIsNotElementType quick filter to 4 collectors in PinForge and DuplicateForge
- Forge(luxesmith-creator): add LuxeSearchBar component to RTMTools design system
- Patrol(emberveil): applied ForgeTextBoxStyle/StandardComboBoxStyle to SpatialForgeWindow unstyled inputs
- Patrol(flameveil): added AutomationProperties.Name binding to BulkUpdateAction button at line 602
- SpatialForge crash fixes
- Forge(quickforge): cache milestone echo animations as static fields to eliminate per-call heap allocations
- Patrol(luxesmith): replaced scattered TabItem styles with canonical ForgeTabItemStyle
- Patrol(noxshade): removed 3 dead Batch 2 state tracker fields from SumForgeWindow
- Patrol(questwright): added Dungeon Alchemy System — ingredients, elixir recipes, crafting methods
- Patrol(ashbane): harden ViewportPosition load reads with NomadFileSystem retry
- Peer(trickster): filter craftable elixirs by ingredient availability
- Forge(wayfinder): enrich idle tip pool and add 3 new contextual tip triggers
- Peer(runesmith): fix two inaccurate idle tips in WayfinderTipEngine
- Elder(lorewyrm): remove duplicate ExportForge idle tip, deduplicate PinForge tip
- Gate all easter-egg particle toys behind EnableEasterEggs
- Patrol(ironvow): added Sentinel.ConstantTimeEquals and ClearBytes to RTMTools.Core.Security
- Peer(hearthstone): migrate HMAC comparison to Sentinel.ConstantTimeEquals in LicenseManager.cs
- Patrol(forgewyrm-creator): reset achievement IsNew flag after toast dismiss
- Patrol(steelward): Created ErrorBuilder and CommandError — standardized TaskDialog error builder for RTMTools commands
- Peer(vigilant): Migrate SortForgeCommand catch block to ErrorBuilder pattern
- Patrol(plumbersmith-creator): fix sender in OnStreakBroken event invocation
- Forgemaster: align OnMilestoneReached sender with OnStreakBroken pattern
- Patrol(aegis): fix DownButton off-by-one in SheetIndexSorterWindow
- Patrol(sumsmith-creator): add magnitude bonus to Resonance system — big Tier 1→3 jumps get head start
- Patrol(glimmerscale-creator): Added FlowField physics framework and GlimmerField interactive playground with G-L-I-M-M-E-R key trigger
- Patrol(swiftblade): CadForgeCommand single-pass sheet sort (OrderBy+ThenBy → Comparer)
- Forge(arcadesmith-creator): bridge LogicSweeperGame to ArcadeGameBase
- Patrol(cinderbloom): unsubscribe timer Tick handlers in RegionForgeWindow.OnClosed
- Patrol(embersong): add WhereElementIsNotElementType quick filter to 5 collectors in KeyForgeViewModel
- Patrol(emberveil): weave ForgeTooltip* DynamicResource bindings into KeyForge welcome ToolTip
- Peer(pathfinder): fix HealthCheckWindow Circuit Breaker overlay hardcoded colors
- Patrol(flameveil): add ReduceMotion guard to PinButton and UnpinButton in PinForgeWindow — eliminates RepeatBehavior=Forever + DropShadowEffect anti-pattern (WCAG 2.1 AA / xaml-safety rule)
- Forge(sparkweave-creator): added ForgeAttention — beckon/spotlight animation system in RTMTools.UI
- Peer(stormwing): fix Beckon ReduceMotion — remove stray Opacity=1 that bypassed the guard
- Forgemaster: fix FlashSpotlightInstant — restore original border after flash so ReduceMotion path never leaks state
- Patrol(sparkweave): added EmberlightReadyGlowButtonStyle to UseButton and BatchButton in ViewportPositionQuickSelectWindow; null Effect on both buttons in OnClosing for render-thread cleanup
- Forge(compassforge-creator): create PredictiveDefaults — workflow intelligence engine for form field pre-fill
- Peer(prismsight): fix ThemeProperties.ReduceMotion null-guard and add AutomationProperties on action buttons
- Patrol(shadowforge): fix KeyForgeWindow busy overlay for dark mode
- Patrol(velvetforge): add terminal periods to 5 empty-state messages
- Patrol(conciergeforge): polish PatchNotesWindow export error with specific exception types
- Patrol(crown): polish ExportButton label in CadForgeWindow from 'Forge DWGs' to 'Export DWGs'
- Patrol(shimmerweave): Add ShadowBreathAnim storyboard and wire into StartBreathAnimation/StopBreathAnimation
- Patrol(charm): added placeholder + tooltips to SpatialForgeWindow toolbar
- Patrol(bellows): fix TextTrimming overflow in ViewportPositionQuickSelectWindow and add DropShadowEffect cleanup in RegionForgeWindow OnClosing
- Forge(quickforge): cache pulse history animations and timer — no per-call allocs
- Peer(anvilwyrm): fix indentation drift in HidePulseHistory ReduceMotion block
- Patrol(noxshade): remove dead ApplyBatch2TickEffects method and its only caller
- Correct ribbon tab name from RTMTools to Forge in AdWindows lookups
- Keyforge fixes and spatial forge fixes
- Patrol(forgeheart): redirect PulseLaunching from DropShadowEffect to Border.Opacity
- Forge(wayfinder): fix command name mismatches in Wayfinder tip trigger conditions
- Patrol(glimmerscale): fix LogicSweeper Game Over z-index — particles no longer obscure win/loss message
- Peer(runesmith): deduplicate WayfinderTip array — collapse triplicate tips into single canonical array, fix indentation, normalize naming
- Patrol(loretome): add 1.0.36 changelog block for KeyForge overhaul, BarForge ribbon fix, crash hardening
- Forge(treasureveil): ingredient discovery toast with rarity-scaled reveal
- Elder(cruciwyrm): unsubscribe OnIngredientDiscovered in OnClosed phase 2
- Patrol(lorespell): create RTMTools.UI/README.md — first architecture doc for the UI layer
- Peer(cartomancer): confirm RTMTools.UI/README.md architecture is accurate
- Forge(tempestforge): add ShockwaveModifier to SumForge Mania mode
- Patrol(runeweave): rename StarLinkStar.Clicked to IsClicked for boolean naming consistency
- Forge(oraclevein): add forge-memory query to verify and impact-analysis skills
- Patrol(hearthwind): clarify HealthCheck status pill — shows error/warning counts together
- Peer(runesmith): add prescriptive guidance to HealthCheck report headers
- Patrol(switchyard): add IsLinked guard to SpatialForgeCommand.Run() and add IsLoaded check to zombie recovery
- Patrol(threadguard): fix fire-and-forget async void in ScheduleForCurrentTransition
- Patrol(ironvow): created Sentinel.TryReadTinyJsonField — unified hand-scan JSON parser with null-byte/DoS guards; migrated ForgeSyncInstallerHook.TryReadPendingVersion and ForgeSyncStatusReader.IsSnoozeActive to shared helper
- Patrol(steelward): migrate DuplicateViews and ToggleHalftone to CommandError.ShowOperationFailed
- Forge(plumbersmith-creator): stop all 5 Forever storyboards in ForgeFloatingStatus.OnClosing
- Forge(sumsmith-creator): fix intensity overlay timer leaks and re-trigger races in SumForgeWindow
- Peer(chaosmaw): add StopAllEffectTimers and UnregisterEffectTimer to AnnounceResonanceOverdrive to match tier transition pattern
- Patrol(aegis): Guard GetSelection() null refs, defer OrderBy until needed
- Elder(cruciwyrm): silence double-Unregister in ResonanceOverdriveFade_Tick, add ReduceMotion guard to AnnounceResonanceOverdrive
- Forge(glimmerscale-creator): Stop RepeatBehavior=Forever glow anim and null DropShadowEffect on AchievementBorder in AboutWindow.OnClosing
- Peer(anvilwyrm): catch InvalidOperationException from ItemContainerGenerator during fast window close
- Patrol(swiftblade): add WhereElementIsNotElementType to MatchTagLocationCommand FEC chain
- Merge main into dev-patrol (prefer dev-patrol on conflicts)
- Restore ComputeRecencyWeight method name in WorkflowChainService

_(+ 111 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

_(comparing only the most recent 250 commits — see GitHub for the full diff)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
